props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the selected value will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: The aria-labelledby attribute identifies the element that labels the dropdown. Normally it is the id of the label.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Specifies the autocomplete attribute for the dropdown input. Native only.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the dropdown control.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state on the dropdown.

props.name: filterable
props.description: When true, allows filtering options by typing into the input field.

props.name: id
props.description: The id attribute for the dropdown element.

props.name: itemFilter
props.description: Applies to goab-dropdown-item. Text used to filter and match this item in typeahead search.

props.name: itemLabel
props.description: Applies to goab-dropdown-item. Display label for the dropdown item.

props.name: itemMountType
props.description: Applies to goab-dropdown-item. Controls how the item is registered with the parent dropdown.

props.name: itemTestId
props.description: Applies to goab-dropdown-item. Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: itemValue
props.description: Applies to goab-dropdown-item. The value submitted when this item is selected.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon shown to the left of the dropdown input.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the dropdown menu. Non-native only.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the dropdown. Use a CSS unit (px, %, ch, rem, em).

props.name: name
props.description: Identifier for the dropdown. Should be unique.

props.name: native
props.description: When true, renders the native select HTML element.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: The text displayed in the dropdown before a selection is made. Non-native only.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the dropdown. Compact reduces height for dense layouts.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value(s) of the dropdown.

props.name: width
props.description: Overrides the autosized menu width. Non-native only.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected value changes.
